dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: I don't think that's enough...we need to help Derry run away.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Hurry, we need to find a way to bridge those gaps! You have the ability to float, I should have mentioned it earlier. Press A when you're close to a gap to activate your ability, then press A whenever the slider is in the green zone to stay in the air.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: I think you can use those crates to fill the gaps enough for Derry to make it across.
